headline: Calnex Solutions Achieves PFC Transparent 400G Network Emulation for Validation Testing of Lossless Ethernet AI Clusters
summary: Calnex Solutions plc (LON: CLX) today announced a significant advancement in network emulation for AI infrastructure, demonstrating 400G Ethernet validation at full line rate with 100 percent throughput while allowing Priority Flow Control (PFC) frames to pass through transparently. The capability enables engineers to test and optimize lossless Ethernet fabrics, including long-haul DCI links using PFC, under controlled and repeatable impairment conditions in the lab.
